chunks.text: ORDER SHEET THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH KARACHI C.P. No. D-2885 of 2025 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE HEARING. 1. For hearing of Misc. No.12841 of 2025 (Stay) 2. For hearing of main case. 11.07.2025 Mr. Ali Raza Lanjar, Advocate for the Petitioner. Ms. Mehreen Ibrahim, DAG along with Deputy Commissioner/Ghulam Murtaza, Nizamani. --------------------- Both parties have agreed for disposal of this Petition by directing the Appellate Tribunal Inland Revenue, Karachi to decide the pending Appeal expeditiously preferably within 60 days from the date of receiving of this Order. In view of the above, this Petition is disposed of by directing the Appellate Tribunal Inland Revenue, Karachi to decide the pending Appeal within said period. In the meantime, no coercive action shall be taken within said period. JUDGE JUDGE Jamil
